strengths: Meets the minimum requirement of 15 years in software engineering, with professional experience dating back to 2006.
Demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative and technical leadership as the Founder of GISCollective and by organizing technical workshops.
Possesses hands-on cloud and recent AI tooling experience, utilizing Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and MCP code generators.
concerns: Lacks the required Director-level experience in driving high-level AI platform strategy and advising strategic enterprise customers.
AI experience appears limited to recent tactical implementation (agentic workflows at re:cinq) rather than recognized, deep AI/ML expertise.
Does not possess the preferred advanced degree in an AI-related field, with a background heavily skewed toward general full-stack and web development.
response.justification: While Aisha meets the baseline requirement of 15 years in software engineering and shows strong entrepreneurial drive as the Founder of GISCollective, she lacks the specific Director-level strategic profile required for this role. The position demands recognized expertise in AI strategy and experience advising strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption. Aisha's resume highlights a solid full-stack 'software craftsman' background with very recent tactical AI tooling work (MCP code generators at re:cinq), rather than the deep, strategic AI leadership and advisory experience expected of a Principal Engineer in AI Strategy.
